title: Achievable
description: A mod that adds a few more advancements to minecraft.
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/Tyea22d.png)

A mod that adds a few more advancements to minecraft.

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

It's a mod so the advancements are global, and so advancement criteria can be added later.

---

Adds 12 NEW advancements!

- Achievable | Have the mod installed
- Mmm... Tasty | Eat something
- What's that sound...? | Have a creeper sneak up on you
- Wet Stuff | Fill a bucket with water
- The Highest Point | Go to the top of the world
- Rock Bottom | Go to the bottom of the world
- A big fork | Acquire a trident
- To be, or not to be? | Acquire a skeleton skull.
- That's a HUGE pufferfish! | Kill an elder guardian
- Toasted Marshmello | Kill a ghast with a trident
- Now you see me | Shoot an invisible mob with a spectral arrow
- It's ALIVEEEEEE! | Summon a snow golem
